content: App Router: useSearchParams() (next/navigation) reads current URL query params as ReadonlyURLSearchParams, e.g. ?amount=5 -> searchParams.get('amount'). useRouter + usePathname (next/navigation) used to programmatically push new URLs with updated query strings. Client Components calling useSearchParams must be wrapped in a Suspense boundary during static/production builds or the build fails. Link href accepts a UrlObject with pathname+query for declarative navigation with query params.
